title: Nerdy Boy Silhouette at Computer in Gadget-Filled Room

actions.comment: === CREATE ALL LAYERS ===
=== STEP 1: Wall base — flat mid-gray filling upper canvas ===
=== STEP 1b: Wall bands — rust red left, ivory white right ===
=== STEP 2: Floor tiles — alternating dark brown, soft gray, beige ===
=== STEP 2b: Floor grid lines — thin light gray outlines ===
=== STEP 3: Desk — flat muted neutral rectangle, center-lower canvas ===
=== STEP 4: Gadgets — simplified flat shapes in muted reds, yellows, greens ===
=== STEP 5: Computer — muted gray-blue monitor rectangle on desk ===
=== STEP 5b: Screen glow — faint lighter rectangle inside monitor ===
=== STEP 6: Figure — black silhouette, hunched posture, seated at desk ===
=== STEP 7: Highlights — thin white lines for glasses and body highlights ===
=== Step 1: wall band warm rust red (background) ===
=== Step 2: wall band ivory white (background) ===
=== Step 3: floor tiles (background) ===
=== Step 4: desk (midground) ===
=== Step 5: gadgets (midground) ===
=== Step 6: computer (midground) ===
=== Step 7: chair (midground) ===
=== Step 8: boy (foreground) ===
=== Step 9: glasses (foreground) ===
